caption: The video captures a professional interview setting at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. Two men, both dressed in suits, are seated across from each other at a small round table equipped with a laptop and some papers. The interviewer, on the left, is gesturing with his hands as he speaks, while the interviewee, on the right, listens attentively. The background shows a bustling conference area with attendees walking around and engaging in conversations. The event appears to be well-attended, with various booths and displays visible in the distance. The overall atmosphere suggests a formal yet dynamic environment typical of a tech conference.
